recap:
- A parsed document table in JSON format is necessary and should be created as per the demo instructions in section `2.2 Demo - Parse Documents to Structured Data`.
- Completion of the document parsing demo is a prerequisite before proceeding with the current section.
- The serverless compute environment version 4 must be selected for the project.
- Instructions for selecting the appropriate environment version can be found in the provided Databricks documentation link.
- Required libraries must be added to the Dependencies of the serverless compute configuration.
- The command `%pip install -qq langchain-text-splitters` is used to install necessary libraries for the project.
